name: SCC_ServiceDiscoveryReq
title: SCC_ServiceDiscoveryReq
syntax: void SCC_ServiceDiscoveryReq ( byte SessionId[], char ServiceScope[], char ServiceCategory[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Service Discovery Request is received.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
